results.description: DESCRIPTION:THIS PROJECT WILL FILL A FUNDAMENTAL GAP ON ORGAN-ON-A-CHIP TOXICITY SCREENING DEVICES TO ASSESS HOW CHEMICAL TO DEVICE SUBSTRATE CONTACT AFFECT THEIR TOXICOKINETICS. A QUANTITATIVE STRUCTURE-PROPERTY RELATIONSHIP (QSPR) MODEL WILL BE DEVELOPED TO PREDICT CHEMICAL-POLYDIMETHYLSILOXANE (PDMS) INTERACTIONS. AFTER INITIAL TESTING OF A SET OF 54 CHEMICALS, THE NEW QSPR MODEL WILL BE USED TO PREDICT SEQUESTRATION INTO PDMS FOR A WIDER SET OF CHEMICALS AND SHOULD ENABLE PROSPECTIVE TOXICOKINETIC MODELING FOR ANY CHEMICAL.ACTIVITIES:.SUBRECIPIENT:OUTCOMES:.
